entries.source: "Opportunity cost"
entries.value: "Teks Opportunity cost"

entries.source: "Should a company enter this market?"
entries.value: "Patutkah syarikat memasuki pasaran ini?"

entries.source: "What makes an argument valid?"
entries.value: "Apa yang menjadikan hujah sah?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Socratic Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Panduan praktikal untuk menggunakan Arahan Sokratik di inspir bagi pembelajaran foundations, dengan prompt, gelung belajar, dan tabiat AI yang lebih selamat.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: A lebih kuat gelung belajar

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tutor AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil pertama step berbanding akhir jawapan.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Minta AI menyemak penaakulan anda, bukan hanya hasilnya.

entries.source: Build a hypothesis.
entries.value: Bina a hypothesis.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish oleh writing idea back daripada memory.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Asas

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Pelajar yang ingin berfikir tentang sesuatu topik, menguji andaian, dan membina pemahaman yang tahan lama.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompt untuk dicuba

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Tutor AI Sokratik Untuk Pemahaman Lebih Mendalam ialah cara berfokus menggunakan AI untuk pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina untuk menukar konsep, hujah, masalah, teks, atau keputusan menjadi rangkaian soalan yang berfokus. Rakan anda mendengar setiap jawapan, memetakan andaian dan jurang, lalu mendorong anda ke arah sintesis akhir sendiri. Cuba: "Bantu saya memahami kos lepas."

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Sokratik Tutor AI Untuk Deeper Understanding: praktikal panduan

entries.source: Socratic Instruction
entries.value: Arahan Sokratik

entries.source: Start the live mode at Socratic Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Collaborative Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Mulakan mod langsung di Arahan Sokratik. Jika anda mahukan format pembelajaran berdekatan, cuba Arahan Kolaboratif. Untuk pandangan platform yang lebih luas, baca perkara yang patut dilakukan oleh rakan pembelajaran AI untuk semua orang.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell mod apa anda ialah trying untuk belajar atau produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Itu difference shows up dalam flow. Bukannya one giant response, terbaik sessions move melalui loop: set goal, try something, get feedback, baiki lemah spot, dan pilih seterusnya action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Fokus itu penting. Chatbot umum boleh menjawab hampir apa sahaja, tetapi mod pembelajaran memberi bentuk kepada perbualan. Ia mengarah anda kepada jenis pemikiran, latihan, maklum balas, atau penerokaan yang membantu idea melekat.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Tutor bertanya satu soalan pada satu masa, menunggu penaakulan anda, dan membuat sintesis hanya selepas anda mencubanya.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ini ialah same habit behind belajar dengan AI tanpa cheating yourself: keep pelajar active. AI ialah most berguna apabila ia gives anda feedback di anda pemikiran.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Mod ini amat berguna untuk pelajar yang mahu:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Try step dalam anda own words.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model.
entries.value: Tukar confusion menjadi clearer model.

entries.source: Use hints before answers.
entries.value: Gunakan petunjuk sebelum jawapan.

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gunakan Arahan Sokratik apabila anda mahukan sesi yang bermula cepat tetapi masih menyesuaikan diri dengan anda. Matlamat pertama bukan untuk kedengaran hebat. Matlamat pertama ialah menjadikan langkah seterusnya terasa mampu dilakukan.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Perkara yang dibantu oleh mod ini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ke mana seterusnya

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Anda juga boleh bermula dengan versi kasar masalah sebenar anda. Prompt pertama yang bersepah tidak mengapa. Sesi boleh menjelaskan tahap, khalayak, tarikh akhir, dan gaya selepas anda bermula.
